faq.title: Watch Ads & Get Paid in {country} - FAQ

items.question: How much can I earn watching ads?
items.answer: Each ad pays between $0.01 and $1.00. Most members earn $30-$100 per month, but active users can earn $200+ by watching their daily limit of 100-200 ads.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is 100% free to join. You never need to pay anything. Just watch ads and get paid.

items.question: How do I get paid for watching ads?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: How long does each ad take?
items.answer: Most ads are 15-60 seconds long. You need to watch the entire ad to earn the reward.

items.question: Can I watch ads on my phone?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog works on all devices - iPhone, Android, tablet, and computer. You can watch ads anywhere.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and many more. Sign up for free to check ad watching availability in {country}.

final.title: Ready to Start Earning in {country}?
